ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Timepoint/visit label
Notes: e.g., Baseline, 6-Month Follow Up, Year 2; Morning, At Bedtime

ElementDescription: Are you currently dating or in a romantic relationship?
Notes: 0= No; 1= Yes; 888= N/A: condition skipped; 999= Missing/no answer

ElementDescription: Which of the following best describes your partner's sexual orientation?
Notes: 1= Asexual; 2= Bisexual; 3= Fluid; 4= Gay; 5= Lesbian; 6= Pansexual; 7= Queer; 8= Straight or heterosexual; 9= They are unsure or questioning; 77= Not listed; 55= I don't know; 888= N/A: condition skipped; 999= Missing/no answer

ElementDescription: Which of the following best describes your partner's sexual orientation? Not listed, specify
Which of these best describes your partner's gender identity? Boy/man and girl/woman categories are inclusive of BOTH cis and trans identities.
Notes: 1= Boy/man; 2= Girl/woman; 3= Nonbinary 55= I don't know; 888= N/A: condition skipped; 999= Missing/no answer

ElementDescription: Does your partner identify as transgender?
Notes: 0= No; 1= Yes; 55= I don't know; 888= N/A: condition skipped; 999= Missing/no answer
